queries.question: Show all chalets and cabins which cost 200 per night.
queries.sql:
SELECT Chalets.Name 
FROM Chalets
WHERE (Chalets.Accommodation = "Chalet" OR Chalets.Accommodation = "Cabin") AND Chalets.Price_Per_Night = 200.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?chalets a :Chalets .
  ?chalets p:name ?name .
  ?chalets p:Accommodation ?accommodation_w .
  ?chalets p:Accommodation ?accommodation_w2 .
  ?chalets p:Price_Per_Night ?price_per_night_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?accommodation_w) = "Chalet" || STR(?accommodation_w2) = "Cabin")) && (STR(?price_per_night_w) = "200" || STR(?price_per_night_w) = "200.0")))
}
